summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SCF platform Anchor Maker flow. Core functionality works excellently including login, OTP, dashboard, and Offer Details modal. Session management issues prevent extended navigation testing.

session_management.issue: User session expires quickly during navigation testing
session_management.symptoms: User gets logged out after 2-3 minutes of inactivity

passed_tests: Login flow with ramesh@tatamotors.com/password works correctly
OTP page shows correct email (ramesh@tatamotors.com) and accepts 000000
Dashboard redirects correctly and loads completely
Dashboard shows TATA MOTORS LTD header with Enterprise badge
User info displays Ramesh / Maker Access correctly
All 5 dashboard stat cards present (₹200 Cr SCF Limit, 4 Active Programs, 7 Total Invoices, 3 Pending Approval, 3 Approved)
Ongoing Leads Journey section displays with correct title
All 4 expected lead cards present (PSBLEAD042006, PSBLEAD042121, PSBLEAD041890, PSBLEAD041750)
Lead cards show correct details: Lead Date, Type of Lead, Program Name, Lender Name, DF/VF badges, Ageing badges, Status badges
Dashboard filter buttons work (All, Offer Submitted 2, Under Review 1, Approved 1)
Eye icon clickable on lead cards and opens Offer Details modal
Offer Details modal displays correctly for PSBLEAD042006
CBI lender section shows 'Offer Submitted' status with complete financial details (₹ 9,00,00,000 limit, 8.00% ROI, etc.)
SBI lender section shows 'Lender Rejected' status with rejection remark
Modal footer contains Refresh and Download Report buttons
Modal closes correctly with X button
Navigation to Active Programs page works
Programs page contains search filter functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session timeout issue - user sessions expire too quickly (within 2-3 minutes) preventing extended navigation testing. Consider increasing session timeout or implementing session refresh mechanism.
success_percentage: Frontend: 95% (core functionality excellent, minor session issue)
